recensioni.label: WHAT PEOPLE SAY ABOUT US
recensioni.title:
Two points of view,
one certainty.

professionisti.quote: I finally have a professional space without the weight of a fixed rent. EQB let me focus on my clients instead of on costs.
professionisti.name: Marco R.

professionisti.quote: The community is the real added value. I found colleagues to collaborate with, and clients are starting to arrive through internal word of mouth too.
professionisti.name: Sara M.

professionisti.quote: I work better, I earn more, without the anxiety of a monthly fee. EQB is the model I'd been looking for for years.
professionisti.name: Luca P.

clienti.quote: A curated environment, skilled professionals. I found the trainer, the osteopath and the nutritionist all in one place. I won't look anywhere else.
clienti.name: Giulia F.

clienti.quote: I started with pilates and then discovered physiotherapy. An integrated path I'd never found elsewhere, in a beautiful, welcoming place.
clienti.name: Andrea B.

clienti.quote: The quality of the professionals is clear from the very first appointment. Clean, organised space, with a different atmosphere you can feel.

aziende.heroSub: If you're looking for a different setting for a workshop, an event or an ongoing collaboration, tell us what you have in mind.
aziende.eventiTagline: The right place to do it well.
aziende.eventiBody: We host experiences built around wellness: workshops, gatherings, formats dedicated to people who work with the body and with people. We provide the setting, the network of professionals who live the space every day, and care for every detail.
aziende.partnershipTagline: A home for those who work with continuity.
aziende.partnershipBody: We work with businesses that share our approach to wellness. True psychophysical wellness happens when body, movement and recovery work together. Brands, professionals and projects who want to grow in a setting built on quality and trust.
aziende.fieldMsgPlaceholder: What do you need? When would you like to do this?

benessere.openingSub: Find the professional, the path or the activity that best fits your needs.
benessere.accTitle: No path is the same for everyone.
benessere.accIntro: At EQB you'll find professionals, paths and activities that work together to guide you in the way that best fits your needs. Whether you have a precise goal or don't know where to start yet, together we find the right direction.

accPillars.d: Listening to your needs and identifying your starting point.
Designing a path built around you.
Making self-care part of your everyday life.

postura.eyebrow: You have a goal but don't know where to start?
postura.title:
Postural
Assessment
postura.body1: A first meeting to understand where your problem really comes from, not just where it hurts.
postura.body2: If the pain keeps coming back, it's often not bad luck: so far the symptom has been treated, not the cause. Together we look at your situation and come out of it with a clear direction on what to do, not with yet another treatment to try.
postura.tiltSub: From the first visit you'll understand why it hasn't worked so far.

features.label: Understand
features.title:
Postural
Path
features.micro: For those tired of starting over every time. We go to the root of the pain that keeps coming back, not just the symptom, until you can manage it on your own.

features.label: Move
features.title:
Pilates
Reformer
features.micro: For those who want to improve strength, mobility and movement control with a path built around them.

features.label: Recover
features.title:
Recovery
& Wellness
features.micro: For those who train, work intensely, or feel the need to slow down and regain energy.

features.label: Build
features.title:
Nutrition
& Fitness
features.micro: For those who want to build sustainable habits and get back in shape with a clear direction.

benessere.divider: Every path is born from the meeting between your needs and the expertise of the professional who's right for you.

coworking.openingTitle:
You've built your
professional skills for years.
coworking.openingEm: But it's still not really yours.
coworking.painIntro: Anyone who wants to work independently in wellness always ends up in the same four traps. Every day.

pains.title: The clients are never really yours.
pains.body: You work in someone else's studio, and their clients stay theirs. The day you move on, you start from zero. You're building someone else's book of clients, not your own.

pains.title: You work hard, and little is left for you.
pains.body: Percentages on the studio, cuts on every session, terms decided by someone else. The more clients you bring in, the bigger the share you leave on the table.

pains.title: You keep chasing spaces, never building a base.
pains.body: A bit at clients' homes, a bit in a small room, a bit in a cold centre. No place that feels like yours, no stable professional identity.

pains.title: On your own, you stay invisible.
pains.body: No colleagues to compare notes with, no spontaneous referrals, no collaborations. Even the best professional, isolated, doesn't grow.

coworking.painClose: It's not your fault. It's a system that keeps you dependent.
coworking.solutionIntro: EQB is an ecosystem designed to make you independent, not to just host you. A precise answer to each of your problems.

pillars.title: The clients are yours. Full stop.
pillars.body: You build your own book of clients, under your own name. We give you space and tools to grow it, we don't take your clients.

pillars.title: What you earn stays yours.
pillars.body: No percentages on your sessions: every client is worth the full amount, for you. And the model rewards those who work: the more hours you do, the less you pay per hour.

pillars.title: A base, finally your own.
pillars.body: A professional, curated space, always ready: a reception that welcomes your clients, zero bills, zero cleaning. A real address, not a room by the hour.

pillars.title: Visible, from day one.
pillars.body: A recognisable space in the heart of Milan and a name that gives you credibility before you even speak. Anyone who walks in trusts you from the very first moment.

coworking.practiceLabel: And in practice, it works like this

steps.title: Book
steps.body: Choose the spaces and time slots you need, a day ahead or in real time.

steps.title: Work
steps.body: You'll find everything ready. Equipped space, curated setting. You just focus on your clients.

steps.title: Pay
steps.body: At the end of the month, only for the hours you used. No upfront payment: you work and earn first, then you pay.

coworking.diffTitle:
We don't just give you a space.
We help you fill it.
coworking.diffBody: Personal brand, content, campaigns: we put our marketing skills to work for your growth, so the right clients can find you. You bring the talent, we bring the amplifier.
coworking.diffProof: Everyone who took this path has grown. That's how a name is built.

testimonials.name: Cristiana Curioni
testimonials.quote: Here I'm not renting a room: I've built my own name. The clients are mine, and for the first time I truly feel it.

testimonials.name: Roberta Boara
testimonials.quote: I joined while working alone. Today I collaborate, I get referrals, and my work has grown together with the space.

testimonials.name: Loris Bonacina
testimonials.quote: I train my clients in a curated space, and collaborations with the other professionals happen naturally.

coworking.communityTitle:
You're not a guest.
You're part of something.
coworking.communityBody1: At EQB, physiotherapists, trainers, osteopaths, nutritionists and psychologists all work together. Professionals who know each other, refer each other, and build integrated paths for their clients.
coworking.communityBody2: It's not a side benefit. It's the heart of the model. Your colleague's client is your potential client, and vice versa. The network is worth as much as the space.

objections.q: “What if I can't bring my clients along?”
objections.a: That's exactly where we help: personal brand, content and campaigns to get you found. And in the meantime you're in a space where clients already circulate, among colleagues who exchange referrals.

objections.q: “I'm scared to leave the studio where I work now.”
objections.a: You don't have to leave everything at once. You only pay for the hours you use: start with a few, keep the rest, and move your work here at your own pace.

objections.q: “Right now I don't have the budget for another space.”
objections.a: It's not another fixed cost: you only pay when you work, and the more you grow the less you pay per hour. You start small: the investment follows your clients, it doesn't come before them.

coworking.ctaTitle:
Tell us about you.
We'll take care of the rest.
coworking.ctaSub:
Five minutes for your application.
We read it in person, then we call you.
coworking.ctaUrgency: The space is physical: spots aren't unlimited.

portabili: A solid base that follows me

intro.title: Tell us about yourself.
intro.sub: This isn't a form to fill in. We read every application in person: if your profile fits EQB, we'll call you.
intro.scarcity: The space is physical: spots are not unlimited.

categoria.title: What do you do?
categoria.sub: You can select more than one option.
categoria.altroPlaceholder: Do something else? Write it here

portabiliStep.title: Do you already have clients you'd bring to EQB?
portabiliStep.sub: We care about your starting point, not a perfect number.

appuntamentiStep.title: How many appointments would you take with us?
appuntamentiStep.sub: A weekly estimate: it helps us understand how much space to dedicate to you.

aspettativeStep.title: What do you expect from EQB?
aspettativeStep.sub: There's no right answer: it just helps us understand each other.

inizioStep.title: When do you picture yourself at EQB?
inizioStep.sub: So we understand what timing to work with together.

perche.title: Why EQB?
perche.sub: A couple of lines are enough, if they say the right thing.
perche.placeholder: E.g. I'm looking for an environment to grow in alongside other serious professionals, not just a room for rent.

contatto.title: How can we reach you?
contatto.erroreGenerico: Something went wrong, please try again.

done.title: Your application has arrived.
done.sub: We read every application in person. If your profile fits EQB, we'll call you within a few days.

spazio.openingSub: Designed for those who work with the body.

reception.label: The entrance
reception.title: Reception
reception.body: The reception welcomes your clients, the waiting room puts them at ease. The perfect business card, even before they step into your room.

comuni.label: Shared spaces
comuni.title: Common Areas
comuni.body: A snack corner for a break between clients. Bathrooms with showers for those who arrive in a rush or train before working.

sala.label: Main floor
sala.title: Training Room
sala.body: Iron wall rack, 2 Merrithew Reformers with tower, 2 Chairs, free weights and dumbbells, wooden bench. Natural light from three windows, herringbone parquet floor.
sala.caption: Training Room

terra.label: Main floor
terra.title: Terra Room
terra.body: A bright 20 sqm room with an adjustable treatment table, wall bars and a large desk. The right space for those who work with method, session after session.
terra.caption: Terra Room

sole.label: Lower floor · Relax & Recovery
sole.title: Sole Room
sole.body: A bright 15 sqm room with its own original wallpaper, adjustable treatment table and desk. Designed for those who work calmly and with continuity.
sole.caption: Sole Room

luna.label: Lower floor · Relax & Recovery
luna.title: Luna Room
luna.body: A 15 sqm room with its own original wallpaper, adjustable treatment table and desk. The ideal retreat for those who need privacy.
luna.caption: Luna Room

spazio.ctaTitle:
Discover how to make
this space yours.
spazio.ctaBody: Zero fixed costs and a setting designed to help you work at your best, every day.
spazio.stickyText: Want to work in this space?
spazio.scarcityText: The space is physical: spots are not unlimited.

visione.heroSub: Meet the team and discover our mission.
visione.chiSiamoTitle:
EQB isn't just
a physical space.
visione.chiSiamoBody: It's an innovative venture in the psychophysical wellness industry, dedicated to wellness and movement professionals. An ecosystem that brings together spaces, people and opportunities.
visione.missioneBody: ...to create Italy's first, real, chain of multi-purpose coworking studios for therapy, movement and wellness. A curated, selected space where you can truly grow, not just rent a room.

pillars.title: Real flexibility
pillars.body: Hourly model, with no leases or rigid contracts.

pillars.title: Quality of the spaces
pillars.body: Curated settings, reception and services included.

pillars.title: Collaboration
pillars.body: Integrated paths and a real network among specialists.

pillars.title: Growth
pillars.body: Strategic support and access to new clients.

marco.name: Marco Adinolfi
marco.bio: Marco handles the entrepreneurial development and strategic management of EQB. He coordinates the studio's organisation, the brand's positioning and the project's growth, with the goal of creating a space where movement and health professionals can work at their best.

federico.name: Federico Mondin
federico.bio: Federico, an Osteopath and Physiotherapy student, is EQB's clinical reference point. He oversees the quality of treatments and coordinates collaboration among the professionals working in the studio, with the goal of building personalised, integrated paths for every client.

visione.ctaBody: Start working in a curated space, with no constraints, inside an ecosystem that supports your growth.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.heroSub: How we handle the data of visitors to eqbmilano.it. In short: this site doesn't use profiling cookies and doesn't store the data you enter in the form.
privacy.titolareBody:
EQB Milano di Adinolfi Marco — sole proprietorship
Registered office: Via Caravaggio 2, 20054 Segrate (MI), Italy
Operating address: Viale Regina Margherita 43, 20122 Milan, Italy
VAT 14601140966 · Tax code DNLMRC02A11F205W · REA MI-2794459
Email:
privacy.datiH2: What data we process and why
privacy.dati1Body: The site is hosted on Vercel Inc. (United States). Like any hosting service, Vercel logs technical data (IP address, request time, page visited) necessary for the operation and security of the service. Legal basis: the Data Controller's legitimate interest in the site's correct operation (Art. 6.1.f GDPR). Transfers outside the EU take place based on the safeguards required by the GDPR (standard contractual clauses).
privacy.dati2BodyPost: statistics service: the data collected is aggregated and anonymous, doesn't allow individual visitors to be identified, and isn't used for profiling or advertising. For this reason, the site doesn't require a consent banner.
privacy.dati3Body: The form on the Contact page doesn't send anything to our servers: it prepares a WhatsApp message on your device, which you decide whether to send. If you contact us by phone, email or WhatsApp, the data you provide (name, contact details, message content) is used only to reply to you and handle your request. Legal basis: performance of pre-contractual measures requested by the data subject (Art. 6.1.b GDPR). We keep these communications for as long as necessary to handle the request and any resulting obligations.
privacy.dati4BodyPre: The Contact page includes a Google Maps map that loads together with the page. Through this map, Google may set its own cookies and process data according to its
privacy.cookieBody: The site doesn't use profiling cookies or third-party analytics cookies. The only cookies present are technical ones, necessary for operation, and those from Google Maps, loaded together with the map on the Contact page (see above).
privacy.comunicazioneBody: Data is never sold or transferred to third parties. It may only be accessed by parties who collaborate with the Data Controller in managing the site and the business (technical providers, consultants), appointed as data processors where necessary.
privacy.dirittiBodyPre: Under Articles 15-22 GDPR, you may at any time request access to your data, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, portability, or object to processing. Just write to
privacy.dirittiBodyMid: . If you believe the processing violates the regulation, you can file a complaint with the
privacy.aggiornamentiBody:
This policy may be updated: the version published on this page is the current one.
Last updated: 13 July 2026.
